basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting 01 Project Engineer II post with Ph.D./M.Tech/B.Tech or equivalent qualification and relevant experience. Last date: 15 July 2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of application. Only Indian Nationals are eligible.
qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. or equivalent + 02 years post-qualification experience as software developer/engineer OR M.Tech/M.S./M.Phil. + 04 years OR B.Tech/B.E./M.Sc./MCA + 06 years OR BCA/B.Sc./BA + 10 years (Minimum 60% or equivalent from Graduation onwards and 55% in 10th & 12th)

vacancy_details.details: Total 01 position is announced for Project Engineer II.

selection_process: Applications will be scrutinized and only shortlisted candidates (based on better qualification & relevant experience) will be called for written test and/or personal interview. Selection may comprise written test followed by interview at IITGN premises. Final selection is subject to verification of documents and eligibility.
how_to_apply: Keep PAN Card ready for verification and entry in the form.
No manual, paper, or email applications will be accepted.
Fill accurate information and submit before 15 July 2026.
important_instructions: This is a temporary contractual position for 1 year. Fulfillment of minimum qualifications does not guarantee a call for interview. IITGN reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For queries: Contact Cmde. Manish Tripathi (Retd) at [email protected]

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting 01 Project Engineer II post with Ph.D./M.Tech/B.Tech or equivalent qualification and relevant experience. Last date: 15 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Total 01 position is announced for Project Engineer II.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of application. Only Indian Nationals are eligible.

rows.details: Ph.D. or equivalent + 02 years post-qualification experience as software developer/engineer OR M.Tech/M.S./M.Phil. + 04 years OR B.Tech/B.E./M.Sc./MCA + 06 years OR BCA/B.Sc./BA + 10 years (Minimum 60% or equivalent from Graduation onwards and 55% in 10th & 12th)
Experience in server management, big data (Hadoop, Spark), cloud technologies, system integration, mobile platforms, certifications, etc.
40 years as on last date of application

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II Recruitment 2026 Job Description & Skills
content_sections.text: Job Description: Senior full stack developer Design, develop, test and implement software solutions Participate in code reviews, security testing, issue resolution Guide day-to-day software and project development Configuration management, project documentation Mentor junior engineers Ensure Backups and Business Continuity Monitor performance of Production and Development Systems Collaborate with internal and external stakeholders Any other assigned activity Skills/Expertise and Personal Attributes: Knowledge of software design, DevSecOps and Agile RDBMS expert (PostgreSQL, NoSQL/MongoDB) Proficient in Python and Django Experience with AWS or Azure cloud GIT, API development, ETL & Data pipelines Ability to write high-quality code and lead technical discussions IT security, virtualization, business continuity knowledge Good communication and team management skills

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Applications will be scrutinized and only shortlisted candidates (based on better qualification & relevant experience) will be called for written test and/or personal interview. Selection may comprise written test followed by interview at IITGN premises. Final selection is subject to verification of documents and eligibility.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Apply online only at: http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/ Keep PAN Card ready for verification and entry in the form. No manual, paper, or email applications will be accepted. Fill accurate information and submit before 15 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This is a temporary contractual position for 1 year. Fulfillment of minimum qualifications does not guarantee a call for interview. IITGN reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For queries: Contact Cmde. Manish Tripathi (Retd) at [email protected] Apply Online: Click here Official Notification PDF: Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel: Click Here Sarkari Result: Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application submission is 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Engineer II at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Consolidated monthly remuneration ranges from Rs.63,000/- to Rs.1,00,000/-.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for IITGN Project Engineer II post?
faq.answer: Candidates need Ph.D. + 2 years / M.Tech + 4 years / B.Tech + 6 years (or equivalent) post-qualification experience as software developer/engineer with minimum prescribed percentages.

faq.question: Q4. Is the IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II job permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a temporary position for 1 year under the Centre for Research Commercialization.

faq.question: Q5. What skills are required for IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II?
faq.answer: Proficiency in Python & Django, PostgreSQL/MongoDB, AWS/Azure, GIT, API development, ETL pipelines, DevSecOps, and Agile methodologies.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Maximum 40 years as on the last date of application.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II vacancy?
faq.answer: Apply online only through the official link http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/ before 15.07.2026. PAN Card is mandatory.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Project Engineer II at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Shortlisting based on application → Written Test and/or Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Who is the PI for IITGN Centre for Research Commercialization Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: Cmdt. Manish Tripathi (Retd).

faq.question: Q10. Is experience mandatory for IIT Gandhinagar Project Engineer II 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, minimum 2 to 10 years of post-qualification experience as software developer/engineer is required depending on the highest qualification.
